match.userMessage:
Wide locked establishing shot with slight handheld micro-movement. Scarlett turns on the sand and walks steadily away toward the horizon as incoming tide edges closer to the lipstick resting beside the embossed mark. Golden light spreads across the sand creating soft rolling reflections. Light summer fabric flutters gently in the coastal breeze while water laps forward in small incremental advances.

Ambient sounds: gentle waves lapping on sand, soft ocean breeze. soft footsteps on sand, water edging forward.
